name: semantic-memory
description: Local-first persistent semantic memory for Codex: lean/standard/full sm_* MCP profiles, warm HTTP recall hooks, adaptive routing, codebase ingestion, conversation memory, graph exploration, supersession, and memory curation skills.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent local memory, graph recall, and conversation search for Codex
interface.longDescription: Semantic Memory gives Codex shared, local-first memory backed by semantic-memory-mcp. It exposes the current semantic-memory tool surface through lean, standard, and full profiles: hybrid search, direct fact reads, namespace enumeration, adaptive routing, graph traversal, fact supersession, lifecycle curation, conversation sessions, setup verification, warm project-scoped recall hooks, and deterministic repository ingestion.
defaultPrompt: Search semantic memory and verify results
Sync this repo into semantic memory
Audit memory for duplicates and graph gaps
